case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK USA N.A. VS. SERGHEI KOTSERUBOV et al

docket_entries.description: AFFIDAVIT OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK USA N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK USA N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOTSERUBOV, SERGHEI $4,115.28 PRINCIPAL, $775.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $681.53 INTEREST, $334.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,905.81, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT & COMPLAINT; AND AFFIDAVIT OF VENUE [DECL OF MAILING AND DECL OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED THERETO], PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK USA N.A. SERVED OCT-19-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KOTSERUBOV, SERGHEI
DECLARATION OF MARK D. WALSH RE: INTEREST; CCP 1033(B)(2); & REQUEST FOR USE OF COPIES - IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK USA N.A.
DECLARATION OF MICHELLE CARN RE: CCP 585(D) - IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK USA N.A.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $114.24 INTEREST, $250.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK USA N.A.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE RE: SUMMONS; COMPLAINT; AFFIDAVIT OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK USA N.A.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $334.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT KOTSERUBOV, SERGHEI
